description: Perform a moderated linear regression analysis using the ToothGrowth dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv. Model 'len' as the dependent variable with 'dose' (covariate) and 'supp' (factor) as predictors, including their interaction term ('dose * supp'). The analysis should include R, R², Adjusted R², Estimates, and Confidence intervals. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth_Moderated.omv. Document the R-squared, overall F-statistic, overall p-value, interaction term estimate, and interaction term p-value in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/moderated_regression_results.txt.
